name: Flipkart Search Autocomplete Engine
scenario: Build autocomplete for Flipkart search using Trie with insert/search/suggest.

core.description: Trie: insert, search, startsWith, suggest(prefix) → List<String>
README: Trie vs HashMap for prefix search

ai_policy_explanation: Trie node: Trie[] ch=new Trie[26]; boolean end; (optional String word). Insert: cur=root; for each char: i=c-'a'; if ch[i]==null create; cur=ch[i]; end loop sets cur.end=true. Search: same traversal, return cur.end. StartsWith: same traversal, return true (no end check). Suggest: traverse to prefix end, then DFS collecting all nodes with end=true.
